field_descriptions.instance_id: Instance name, e.g., tiny_qaoa_ready_package or small_time_indexed_solver_package.
field_descriptions.formulation_type: QUBO, Ising, BQM_BINARY, BQM_SPIN, QuadraticProgram, etc.
field_descriptions.solver_backend: Backend or primitive, e.g., StatevectorSampler, dimod, manual_bruteforce.
field_descriptions.solver_version: Package or solver version if available.
field_descriptions.run_type: bruteforce, classical_exact, simulated_annealing, qaoa_simulator, hardware, etc.
field_descriptions.num_constraints_original: Number of original explicit constraints before QUBO penalty conversion, if applicable.
field_descriptions.reference_solver: Reference method, e.g., brute_force, CP-SAT, NumPyMinimumEigensolver.
field_descriptions.feasible: Whether decoded solution is feasible under original constraints.
field_descriptions.num_reads_or_restarts: Reads, shots, samples, restarts, or repeated trials.
field_descriptions.runtime_seconds: Wall-clock runtime in seconds if measured.
field_descriptions.success_count: Number of successful optimum or target recoveries.
field_descriptions.status: PASS, PARTIAL_PASS, FAIL, SKIPPED, or descriptive status.
field_descriptions.notes: Important caveats, e.g., toy simulator only, no hardware execution.

note: Template only. This does not run any solver.
